settings.heading: Shipping Policy
settings.intro: How and when your order gets to you.

settings.content:
Order processing

Orders are typically processed within [PROCESSING TIME — e.g. 1–2 business days]. You'll receive a confirmation email when your order is placed, and a second email with tracking once it ships.

Delivery times

Estimated delivery times and available shipping methods are shown at checkout based on your location. Typical ranges are [STANDARD: e.g. 3–7 business days] for standard and [EXPEDITED: e.g. 1–3 business days] for expedited service. Delivery estimates are not guaranteed and may be affected by carrier delays, weather, or high-volume periods.

Shipping costs

Shipping is calculated at checkout. [Add any free-shipping threshold here, e.g. "Free standard shipping on orders over $X."]

Tracking your order

Once your order ships, a tracking link is emailed to you. You can also view order status from your account.

International shipping

[State whether you ship internationally. If so, note that import duties and taxes may apply and are the customer's responsibility.]

Questions?

Contact our team via the Contact page and we'll be glad to help.
